text: Ekdum paralyzed hoon. Dimaag totally blank ho chuka hai. Notes kholun ya Papa ko fir se call karun, kuch samajh nahi aa raha. Main phas gaya hoon apni hi inadequacy aur is hostel room ki ghutan mein.

strategy_intent: Validating that his physical freeze is a natural trauma response to consecutive high-stakes stress.
text: Aapka is tarah sunn mehsoos karna, saans atakna aur blank ho jana bilkul swabhavik hai. strategy_intent: Normalizing the delayed processing of academic trauma to provide comfort.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Leading the user through a sensory grounding exercise to interrupt the panic loop.
text: Aahista se uthiye. Jab aap chehra dho lein aur pani piyein, toh sirf us thande pani ke ehsaas aur apni saans par dhyan dijiye. Agar dimaag mein notes ya Papa ki baat aaye, toh usko boliye 'aaj nahi'. Bas is ek pal mein rahiye.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the problem to legitimize ignoring the future for the time being.
